_title: BS 7671:2018 — Requirements for Electrical Installations (IET Wiring Regulations, 18th Edition)
_publisher: The Institution of Engineering and Technology (IET) / British Standards Institution (BSI)

_amendments.summary: Low voltage EV charging (Part 7 Section 722), clarifications to protection against overvoltage (Reg 443), prosumer provisions. This is the current version as of 2024.

note: Always verify against the current purchased copy. This file reflects BS 7671:2018+A2:2022.
scope: Design, erection, verification and inspection of electrical installations in buildings and similar structures. Does not cover supply networks, traction systems, offshore, mines or explosive atmospheres.

structure.appendix1: British Standards to which reference is made
structure.appendix3: Time/current characteristics of overcurrent protective devices
structure.appendix4: Current-carrying capacity and voltage drop for cables
structure.appendix6: Model forms for certification and reporting
structure.appendix8: Current-carrying capacity and voltage drop (for busbar trunking and powertrack systems)
structure.appendix9: Definitions — multiple source, low voltage installations
structure.appendix11: Effect of harmonic currents on cables
structure.appendix13: Methods for measuring the insulation resistance/impedance of floors and walls
structure.appendix14: Measurement of earth fault loop impedance — worked example
